mean_cn: n.危险，（坏事或不快之事发生的）可能性
mean_en: the possibility of something happening that will injure, harm or kill somebody, or damage or destroy something
sentence: The man is in danger whenever he cooks a meal.
sentence_trans: 这男的一煮饭可就危险了。
word_etyma: dan(g)房子，家庭 + er名词后缀，表人或物 → 家庭抵御危险(法语传入) → danger危险
